PREDICTION IMPACT · SELECT ASSET
IMPACT FORMULA
NIF(t) = S · V · D(t) · A · C
S = sentiment [-1,+1] (keyword NLP)
V = article volume weight (log-scaled)
D(t) = exp(-t/τ) decay (τ per-asset)
A = asset news sensitivity factor
C = category modifier (regulatory etc)
ΔPred(h) = NIF × σ_YZ × f(h)
f(h) = 1−exp(−h/τ_OU) horizon scale

◉ Full Transcript [ show ]
—
⚖ AEGIS — PORTFOLIO RISK & ALLOCATION
Builds a risk-managed book from the live per-asset signals and reports its aggregate risk. Tap COMPUTE.
✓ VALIDATION HARNESS — LIVE INVARIANTS
Polling live engine outputs…
PASS = the engine's live output satisfies its mathematical invariants (finite, in-range, stationary α+β<1, probabilities sum to 1, covariance symmetric, risk contributions sum to 1). It does not assert predictive accuracy — that is the separate REALIZED ACCURACY section, shown only where a settled out-of-sample sample exists. “Idle” means the engine has not produced output yet (warming up), which is not a failure.
⚗ ENGINE SELF-TEST SUITE
Runs deterministic unit & property tests on each engine's real math (fixed inputs, known answers). Auto-runs at load.
These are deterministic regression tests — the same fixed input must always yield the same known-correct output. They verify the engine math is correct, independent of live data, and run automatically on every page load. If any test fails at load, the toolbar icon turns red. This is what lets the file defend its own correctness without external checking.
◉ GMI™ — GLOBAL MACRO INTELLIGENCE
Assesses every sentiment-scored headline of the last 30 minutes into a structured, unbiased global economic & financial outlook. Auto-refreshes every minute; a historical snapshot is saved every 30 minutes. Feeds the EDGX / Jane newscast. No manual action needed — ASSESS NOW also adds AI prose.
Methodology: every scored story is theme-tagged, then aggregated with tier-weighting (source quality) and recency decay. The report shows the full sentiment distribution and surfaces both constructive and defensive themes — it does not net them into a single directional claim. Reports persist to a local IndexedDB ring buffer (newest kept, oldest auto-deleted) so the cross-reading trend survives reloads.
⏳ CHL™ — CATALYST HALF-LIFE
Measuring how fast the market absorbs each news catalyst. Tap SCAN NOW.
Methodology: each scored news mention-event (timestamp + sentiment direction) is aligned to the asset's 1-minute price path. The signed cumulative response is fit to an information-absorption curve x(τ)=R·(1−e−τ/T), giving the half-life t½=T·ln2 — the minutes to absorb half the eventual move. Amplitude R and rate λ are estimated jointly; each fit is volatility-gated, fit-gated (R²), and saturation-gated — absorption slower than the window is reported as unresolved, never guessed. Catalysts that move against their sentiment are logged as failures. Nothing is fabricated. Settled observations persist locally so the distribution by regime × tier × direction grows every session.
◎ CMIOS™ — NARRATIVE SYSTEMIC PRESSURE
Measuring the structure of market attention. Tap SCAN NOW.
Methodology: the live news pool is classified into the ten macro themes, then four structural metrics are computed over a rolling window — H (entropy: attention concentrated in one story versus diffuse), ρ (do narratives co-move or stay independent), λ (how fast attention rotates), and the composite κ=(1−H)·λ·(1+ρ), a SYSTEMIC PRESSURE index that rises when the market crowds into a single fast-rotating, correlated narrative — a herding and fragility signature. All inputs are real classified news; nothing is synthetic. ρ, λ and κ warm up after a few cycles and persist locally.

Trading Mode
Paper Trading (Default)
Simulated trading using live EDGX price data. No API keys required. Virtual balance configurable via PAPER_START_USDT (default: $10,000 USDT). Full order book simulation. Zero risk — recommended for strategy validation.
Binance Testnet
Real Binance infrastructure with test funds. Requires Binance Testnet API keys (register at testnet.binance.vision). CORS-compatible from browser. Ideal for validating live connectivity before real deployment.
Live Trading (Real Funds)
Direct Binance production API. Requires IP-whitelisted API key with trading permissions. Note: browsers enforce CORS — live mode requires a local proxy or Binance-whitelisted origin. Keys stored in session memory only.
API Credentials (session memory only — never persisted or transmitted to third parties)
API keys are stored exclusively in JavaScript session memory. They are cleared when this page is closed or refreshed. Ensure your key has trading permissions only — disable withdrawals. Whitelist only the IPs you use with Binance IP restriction.
API Key
API Secret Handle with extreme care
Security Checklist
CRITICAL SECURITY RULES
• Never share your API secret with anyone — treat it like a password
• Enable IP restriction on your Binance API key
• Disable withdrawal permissions on the trading key
• This dashboard makes direct HTTPS calls to Binance API — no intermediary
• API signing uses Web Crypto HMAC-SHA256 in-browser — secret never leaves your device
• Keys are wiped from memory when the page closes — never written to disk
Proxy Configuration (Live Mode)
Browsers block cross-origin authenticated requests to Binance (CORS). For live mode: run a local proxy or use the testnet endpoint which is CORS-permissive.
Proxy Base URL (leave blank for direct / testnet)
Testnet endpoint: https://testnet.binance.vision/api
Production endpoint: https://api.binance.com/api
